Localization.Description: Suspicious activity related to creating or launching hidden files

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.name} launched a hidden file on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created hidden file {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created file "{object.name}" to hide files in directory {object.path} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed attributes of file "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host} to hide it
User {subject.account.name} launched a file {object.process.name} from a hidden directory {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} launched a file {subject.process.name} from a hidden directory {datafield4} on host {event_src.host}
